evals.prompt: I have a MatrixScan (BarcodeBatch) Android Activity and I want to migrate it to MatrixScan AR (BarcodeAr) so I can show interactive highlights on each tracked barcode. Here is my current Activity: BatchActivity.kt
evals.expected_output: The skill rewrites the Activity to use BarcodeAr: replaces BarcodeBatch.forDataCaptureContext with the BarcodeAr(dataCaptureContext, settings) constructor, swaps BarcodeBatchSettings for BarcodeArSettings, removes the manual Camera / DataCaptureView / BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay setup in favor of a single BarcodeArView, swaps the listener to BarcodeArListener, supplies a BarcodeArHighlightProvider, and drives the lifecycle through the view.

assertions.text: BarcodeAr( constructor is used with dataCaptureContext and settings
In code, BarcodeBatch.forDataCaptureContext is NOT used to create the mode (semantic)
In code, BarcodeBatchSettings is NOT constructed (semantic)
In code, no DataCaptureView is constructed (semantic)
In code, no BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay is constructed (semantic)
In code, no Camera object is constructed (semantic)
In code, dataCaptureContext.setFrameSource is NOT called (semantic)
onSessionUpdated has a frameData parameter of type FrameData
In code, camera.switchToDesiredState is NOT called (semantic)
